req.title: Procedure record
req.statement: A clinician shall record a Procedure tied to an Encounter.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-011 requires clinicians to record a Procedure tied to an Encounter, with mandatory encounter reference and storage confirmation. The test suite covers three dimensions: (1) nominal flow with valid encounter reference (positive/EP), (2) missing encounter triggering 422 error (negative/NEG), and (3) boundary conditions around encounter reference formats and procedure payload limits (boundary/BVA). All tests are deterministic, idempotent, and use state isolation via unique encounter IDs.

tests.name: test_procedure_record_with_valid_encounter
preconditions: Encounter resource exists with valid ID in system
actions: Create or reference valid Encounter with ID
POST /Procedure with valid encounter reference in body
Capture HTTP response and Location header
expected: Response body contains Procedure resource with id field
Procedure.encounter references the submitted encounter ID
trace: R-HLT-011: Procedure stored when encounter is present

tests.name: test_procedure_record_missing_encounter_returns_422
preconditions: System configured to reject missing mandatory references
actions: POST /Procedure with null or absent encounter field
Capture HTTP response code and error body
expected: Response body contains OperationOutcome with error details
Error message indicates missing or invalid encounter reference
Procedure is not stored in system

tests.name: test_procedure_record_with_malformed_encounter_reference
preconditions: System distinguishes valid from invalid reference formats
actions: POST /Procedure with malformed encounter reference (empty string, invalid UUID, etc.)
Capture HTTP response code and error details
expected: HTTP status 400 Bad Request or 422 Unprocessable Entity
trace: R-HLT-011: Boundary case—malformed encounter reference rejected
Heuristic BVA: Test edge of valid reference format space

tests.name: test_procedure_record_with_nonexistent_encounter_id
actions: POST /Procedure with reference to non-existent encounter UUID
expected: HTTP status 422 or 400 (depending on referential integrity mode)
If validation is strict: error message indicates encounter not found
trace: Heuristic BVA: Test edge of valid encounter ID space

      "executable": "import requests\nimport json\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\ndef test_procedure_record_with_valid_encounter(base_url='http://localhost:8000'):\n    encounter_id = str(uuid4())\n    encounter_ref = f'Encounter/{encounter_id}'\n    procedure_payload = {\n        'resourceType': 'Procedure',\n        'status': 'completed',\n        'code': {\n            'coding': [{\n                'system': 'http://snomed.info/sct',\n                'code': '80146002',\n                'display': 'Examination of heart'\n            }]\n        },\n        'subject': {'reference': f'Patient/{uuid4()}'},\n        'encounter': {'reference': encounter_ref},\n        'performedDateTime': '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'\n    }\n    resp = requests.post(\n        f'{base_url}/Procedure',\n        json=procedure_payload,\n        headers={'Content-Type': 'application/fhir+json'}\n    )\n    assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f'Status {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}'\n    body = resp.json()\n    assert body.get('resourceType') == 'Procedure'\n    assert body.get('id') is not None\n    assert body['encounter']['reference'] == encounter_ref\n"
    },
